site.title: Kelsey Richards - Freelance front-end Developer
site.description: I'm a developer based in Alberta, Canada with a background in business, marketing, and design. I believe in the power of technology to create meaningful experiences and solve real-world problems. With a strong focus on user experience, I strive to create intuitive and engaging digital products that make a positive impact on people's lives.

intro.name: Kelsey Richards
intro.summary: a web developer with strong focus on the user experience, accessibility and performance. I have a background in business, marketing and design, which gives me a unique perspective on how to create meaningful digital experiences that solve real-world problems.

supportLink.imageAlt: Buy Me a Coffee at ko-fi.com

about.intro: Hi, I'm Kelsey, a front-end software developer from Alberta.

about.passion: I'm also passionate about music, design, and exploring the latest trends in technology. In my spare time, you'll find me out in nature with my dog or relaxing at home with a good video game.
